query:
SELECT 
  planName,
  COUNT(*) AS service_count,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost), 2) AS total_monthly_cost,
  ROUND(AVG(monthlyCost), 2) AS avg_monthly_cost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 2) AS total_monthly_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost), 2) AS total_monthly_margin
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
  AND status IN ('archived', 'flagged_for_termination')
GROUP BY planName
ORDER BY total_monthly_cost DESC
LIMIT 20;
